HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER MELVIN LAWRENCE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. MELVIN T LAWRENCE HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Shanesse L. Gipson was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minor, Sajanae Zharieya Lawrence.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Melasia Zharieya Lawrence.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-17-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank Drago, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Petitioner: Shanesse L. Gipson, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Sajanae Zharieya Lawrence.
No appearance by Minor's Father/Co-Petitioner: Melvin Lawrence.
Matter is ordered off calendar, for Ms. Gipson to file an Amended Petition with declaration and request for an Order waving publication of the Amended OSC Hearing date.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Jan-28-2009 Denied
